name: sales-connectors-demo
description: Demo plugin for validating connector recommendations across Composio, Canvas Email, and MCP.

composio.label: HubSpot
composio.reason: Use CRM records and company data during sales workflows.

email.label: Sales inbox
email.reason: Read and send sales emails through Canvas Email, not through Composio Gmail.

mcp.name: sales-research
mcp.label: Sales Research MCP
mcp.reason: Optional external research tools for prospect and account enrichment.

interface.shortDescription: Test recommended connector status and setup CTAs
defaultPrompt: Use /sales-connector-readiness to check whether the recommended sales connectors are configured.
